title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_retrieval.py (第 361 至 633 行，共 633 行) ---
 361 |         return score
 362 | 
 363 |     def _tokenize(self, text: str) -> List[str]:
 364 |         """
 365 |         简单分词（支持中英文）
 366 | 
 367 |         Args:
 368 |             text: 输入文本
 369 | 
 370 |         Returns:
 371 |             词项列表
 372 |         """
 373 |         import re
 374 | 
 375 |         # 英文单词
 376 |         words = re.findall(r'\b[a-zA-Z]{2,}\b', text.lower())
 377 | 
 378 |         # 中文分词（简单实现：提取 2-3 字的片段）
 379 |         # 注意：这是简化版本，实际应用中应使用 jieba 等分词工具
 380 |         chinese_2char = re.findall(r'[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{2}', text)
 381 |         chinese_3char = re.findall(r'[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{3}', text)
 382 | 
 383 |         # 合并并去重
 384 |         chinese = list(set(chinese_2char + chinese_3char))
 385 | 
 386 |         return words + chinese
 387 | 
 388 |     def hybrid_recall(
 389 |         self,
 390 |         query: str = "",
 391 |         top_k: int = 5,
 392 |         file_path: Optional[str] = None,
 393 |         error_type: Optional[str] = None,
 394 |         kinds: Optional[List[str]] = None,
 395 |         include_summaries: bool = True,
 396 |         include_items: bool = True,
 397 |     ) -> List[MemoryRecallResult]:
 398 |         """统一 Hybrid Recall：整合 MemoryItem、Episodic SessionSummary 与长期 SessionSummary。"""
 399 |         documents = self._build_documents(include_summaries=include_summaries, include_items=include_items)
 400 |         query_terms = self._tokenize(" ".join(part for part in [query, file_path or "", error_type or ""] if part))
 401 |         ranked: List[Tuple[MemoryDocument, float, List[str]]] = []
 402 | 
 403 |         normalized_file = self._normalize_path(file_path) if file_path else ""
 404 |         normalized_error = (error_type or "").lower()
 405 |         allowed_kinds = {kind.lower() for kind in kinds} if kinds else None
 406 | 
 407 |         for doc in documents:
 408 |             if allowed_kinds and doc.kind.lower() not in allowed_kinds:
 409 |                 continue
 410 | 
 411 |             file_match = self._file_match_score(doc, normalized_file) if normalized_file else 0.0
 412 |             error_match = self._error_match_score(doc, normalized_error) if normalized_error else 0.0
 413 |             if normalized_file and file_match <= 0:
 414 |                 continue
 415 |             if normalized_error and error_match <= 0 and doc.kind != MemoryKind.BUG.value:
 416 |                 continue
 417 | 
 418 |             bm25_score = self._calculate_text_bm25_score(query_terms, doc.content) if query_terms else 0.0
 419 |             importance_weight = max(0.0, min(doc.importance, 1.0)) * 0.35
 420 |             recency_weight = self._recency_weight(doc.timestamp)
 421 |             type_weight = self._type_weight(doc.kind, query)
 422 |             score = bm25_score + importance_weight + recency_weight + file_match + error_match + type_weight
 423 | 
 424 |             reasons = []
 425 |             if bm25_score:
 426 |                 reasons.append(f"匹配关键词/文本相关 {bm25_score:.2f}")
 427 |             if importance_weight:
 428 |                 reasons.append(f"重要性 {importance_weight:.2f}")
 429 |             if recency_weight:
 430 |                 reasons.append(f"时间 {recency_weight:.2f}")
 431 |             if file_match:
 432 |                 reasons.append(f"文件匹配 {file_match:.2f}")
 433 |             if error_match:
 434 |                 reasons.append(f"错误匹配 {error_match:.2f}")
 435 |             if type_weight:
 436 |                 reasons.append(f"类型匹配 {type_weight:.2f}")
 437 | 
 438 |             if score > 0 or not query_terms:
 439 |                 ranked.append((doc, score, reasons or ["默认召回"]))
 440 | 
 441 |         ranked.sort(key=lambda item: item[1], reverse=True)
 442 |         results: List[MemoryRecallResult] = []
 443 |         seen = set()
 444 |         for doc, score, reasons in ranked:
 445 |             if doc.id in seen:
 446 |                 ...
